name: James Tour
title: Chemist & Nanotechnologist
bio: American chemist and nanotechnologist at Rice University, one of the world's leading synthetic chemists. Named among 'The 50 Most Influential Scientists in the World Today.'
faith: A Messianic Jewish believer in Jesus who is outspoken about his faith. Tour has given numerous talks on the intersection of science and faith, has challenged abiogenesis claims, and has shared his testimony widely. He has said, 'I stand in awe of God because of what He has done through His creation.'

videos.title: James Tour Testimony & Science and Faith
videos.note: Tour has extensive YouTube content on science and faith
